description.overview: Developed by the Soviet military, the Black Russian Terrier is a powerful, intelligent guardian. They're confident, trainable dogs who bond closely with their families.
description.history: The Black Russian Terrier originated in Russia.
description.temperament: Known for being confident, calm, courageous.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their coarse, dense, wavy coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: Developed by the Soviet military, the Black Russian Terrier is a powerful, intelligent guardian. They're confident, trainable dogs who bond closely with their families.
